title: Scaling Node.js Applications with Microservices
description: Learn how to break down monolithic Node.js applications into scalable, resilient microservices using modern architectural patterns and containerization.

title: The Future of AI: Generative Models in Production
description: An exploration of integrating large language models into existing production workflows, focusing on optimization, cost management, and ethical considerations.

title: Mastering Modern CSS: Beyond Responsive Design
description: Deep dive into CSS Grid, Subgrid, Container Queries, and modern layout techniques that go beyond simple media queries for truly fluid interfaces.

title: Securing the Supply Chain: A Developer's Guide
description: A practical session on identifying and mitigating vulnerabilities in software dependencies and CI/CD pipelines to protect your organization's assets.

title: Cloud Native Observability with OpenTelemetry
description: Discover how OpenTelemetry provides a unified standard for gathering traces, metrics, and logs in distributed systems for better debugging and performance analysis.

title: Building Accessible Web Components with Web Standards
description: Learn the best practices for creating reusable, accessible web components that follow WAI-ARIA guidelines and leverage native browser capabilities.
